paper.title: Developmental cell programs are co-opted in inflammatory skin disease

snippets: two sub-clusters of lymphatic endothelial cells defined by the differential expression of CCL21 and PDPN, which are higher in LE1 and LE2 respectively

LE1 cells express higher levels of the chemoattractant CCL21, which mediates dendritic cell (DC) migration into skin draining lymph nodes, as well as angiogenesis factors CAVIN2 and CCND1, further supporting their function as initial afferent lymphatics
Endothelial cells in the healthy adult dermis comprise vascular endothelium (PECAM1, EMCN) and lymphatic endothelium (LYVE1, PDPN)
relevance: primary source: LE1 cluster definition and function as initial afferent lymphatics

paper.title: Single-Cell Transcriptional Analysis Deciphers the Inflammatory Response of Skin-Resident Stromal Cells

snippets: Endothelial cells in the healthy adult dermis constitute the vascular endothelium (PECAM1, EMCN, SELE, CD93, CLDN5, VWF, and CDH5) and lymphatic endothelium (LYVE1, PDPN, PROX1, and CLDN5)
relevance: secondary source: lymphatic endothelial cell markers confirmed
